subtitle.en: An STM32-based touchscreen watch with an application runtime
subtitle.zh: 一款支持运行用户应用程序的 STM32 触屏手表

intro.en: A wearable embedded platform built around STM32, covering peripheral integration, system software, GUI, and extensibility.
intro.zh: 一个围绕 STM32 搭建的可穿戴嵌入式平台，涵盖外设集成、系统软件、GUI 以及 Python 脚本运行时。
